calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis, #12998.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Robin Truck Lines, Inc. or Gurmukh Singh.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 17, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 17, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Robin Truck Lines, Inc. and Gurmukh Singh as follows:

Damages/Principal - $59,780.12.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,446.63.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $517.72, for a total judgment in the amount of $65,244.47.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: One 2000 Wabash Reefer, VIN# 1JJV532WXYL676001; one 2002 Freighterliner Columbia, VIN #1FUJA6AV12K13936,; one 2002 Freightliner Columbia, VIN #1FUJA6AV42LK13932; one 2004 Utility Reefer 53 x 102 VIN #UYVS25334U234731.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
